summary: Backend-only testing for iteration 3 (check-in, admin panel, withdraw v2). Added /app/backend/tests/test_sonicbet_new_features.py with 21 tests covering withdraw rules (min R$20, R$50 bet gate, CNPJ + all 5 valid pix types, invalid type rejection), check-in (auth gate, initial status, day-1 claim credits wallet R$5, double-claim block, streak=1), and admin panel (admin/me gating, 403 for non-admins on overview/users, admin metrics, users/transactions/contacts lists, approve & reject withdraw flow with refund verification). All 21 new tests pass. Full regression suite (40 tests including iteration 2 sonicbet_api) also passes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1125 lines — recommend splitting into routers (auth, wallet, games, checkin, admin) for maintainability before it grows further.
ADMIN_PHONES is loaded at import time (line 952); editing .env requires backend restart. Acceptable for now but worth noting.

Check-in status endpoint mutates `streak` locally when a day is missed (line 866-868) but does NOT persist the reset to DB. Next /checkin/claim re-derives streak correctly via last_claim_date comparison, so behavior is correct, but the read-side mutation is dead-write — could be removed for clarity.
Withdraw refund on reject is correctly implemented (verified via test_admin_reject_withdraw_refunds_user). Good.
Withdraw error message at line 367 may show a negative value if total_bet>50 due to async race (defensive only); not a real issue under current sync flow.
test_credentials: Admin: phone=11999999999 / password=Test1234 (ADMIN_PHONES env). Non-admin users: random 11-digit phones generated per test.
seed_data_creation: Tests register the admin user (11999999999) once if not already present, plus several random throwaway users. No production-style seed required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two backend test files exist: test_sonicbet_api.py (baseline 19 tests) and test_sonicbet_new_features.py (iteration-3, 21 tests). Run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Admin test uses phone 11999999999 — falls back to login if already registered, so safe to re-run. All check-in / admin / withdraw behaviors covered. Frontend pages Withdraw.js, CheckInWidget.js, Admin.js not e2e tested per user request — main agent can self-test in browser.
